case_title: JONES, B. ELLEN VS MONHART, MICHELLE

docket_entries.description: ORDER UPON CONSIDERATION OF THE REQUEST OF DEFT. MOCHELLE MONHART FOR ENTRY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, & PROOF OF PAYMENT TO PLTFF IN THE SUM OF $3085.31 HAVING BEEN SUBMITTED, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SUBJECT JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY SATISFIED. THEREFORE, DEFT'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED", & THE CLERK SHALL ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ACCORDINGLY.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONHART, MICHELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, B. ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONHART, MICHELLE $3,035.31 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-08-2007, OFF CALENDAR
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION. RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT " GRANTED".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,016.02 FILED BY JONES, B. ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT MONHART, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-02-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT MONHART, MICHELLE
